title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: - **Most likely bug (Medium): silent boot abort before `wireTaskSheet()` binds the close handler.** `wireTaskSheet()` is called only after several unguarded `getElementById(...).addEventListener(...)` calls in `wireComposer()` / `wireLiveActions()`. If any related HTML ID drifts, boot throws before line where `#sheet-close` listener is attached, and `boot().catch(() => {})` suppresses the error, so the sheet opens but close appears dead. Refs: [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:908), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:957), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:987), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:1047), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:1088). - **Secondary pitfall (Low):** `#sheet-close` is missing `type="button"` (defaults to submit). It is safe in the current standalone HTML, but becomes a close-breaker if this markup is ever wrapped in a `<form>` by host/integration. Ref: [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:395).
